message: Last summer, we had a big storm rolling in, and I’ll be honest, I was a bit stressed. I remembered the chaos from previous years—running around at the last minute trying to grab batteries and snacks. But this time, I had actually prepared ahead! I stocked up on essentials and even had a cozy spot set up in our living room with blankets and games for the kids. When the winds picked up and the rain started, instead of panicking, I felt... calm. It was such a relief to finally be the prepared one for once! It made the whole experience a bit more of an adventure than a disaster. How about you? Have you ever found yourself ready when the weather turned? 🌧️
